baseColorHelper: Duk palette ɗin da ke ƙasa sun dogara ne akan wannan launin.
generatedPalettes: Palette ɗin launi da aka ƙirƙira
colorReadError: Ba a iya karanta launin ba. Tabbatar kana amfani da tsarin
enterValidColor: Shigar da launin HEX mai inganci don ƙirƙirar palette. Ana yin duk lissafi a cikin mai binciken ka.

monochromatic.label: Palette mai launi ɗaya
monochromatic.description: Duk launukan suna da launi iri ɗaya (H), suna bambanta musamman a cikin haske (L) a cikin sararin launin HSL.

analogous.label: Palette makamanci
analogous.description: Launuka masu kama da juna - daga kusan -30° zuwa +30° kewaye da launin tushe a kan da'irar launi ta gargajiya (misali Itten).

complementary.label: Palette mai cikawa
complementary.description: Launin tushe da abin da ya cika shi da aka matsar da 180° a kan da'irar launi - ɗaya daga cikin bambancin launi na asali da Johannes Itten ya bayyana.

triadic.label: Palette mai launuka uku
triadic.description: Launuka uku da aka raba su da 120° a kan da'irar launi (kusurwoyin alwatika mai daidaiton gefe) - tsarin lissafin da ake amfani da shi sau da yawa a cikin alamar kasuwanci da ƙirar Bauhaus.

splitComplementary.label: Palette mai raba cikawa
splitComplementary.description: Bambancin palette mai cikawa - maimakon abin cikawa guda ɗaya (180°), ana amfani da launuka biyu da aka matsar da kusan ±30° daga abin cikawa, rage tashin hankali na gani yayin kiyaye bambanci mai ƙarfi.

softPastel.label: Palette pastel
softPastel.description: Launi iri ɗaya tare da rage ɗanɗano da ƙara haske - matsi zuwa tsakiya da saman sararin HSL, yana samar da launuka masu laushi, "mai man shanu".

deepDark.label: Palette mai duhu
deepDark.description: Launi iri ɗaya tare da babban ɗanɗano (S) da rage haske (L) - matsi zuwa ƙasa a kan layin haske, yana samar da launuka masu zurfi na yanayin duhu da alamomin ƙarfi.

materialTonal.label: Palette tonal (Material Design ya zaburar)
materialTonal.description: Matakan haske da yawa na launi ɗaya - L daban-daban da matsakaicin S, kamar kewayon tonal da aka sani daga jagororin Material Design (misali 50-900).

appleMinimal.label: Palette mai sauƙi (Apple ya zaburar)
appleMinimal.description: Alamar launi mai ƙarfi guda ɗaya da launuka masu haske da yawa, masu laushi na tsaka-tsaki - tsarin da ake saba da shi a cikin fuskokin da ke da sarari mai yawa da inuwa masu laushi.
